This project is a psychology counseling website for a psychologist in Pune, India.

Tech stack:
Next.js 14
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
Supabase

Features:
SEO optimized pages
Blog system
Appointment booking system
Admin dashboard
Google AdSense integration
Google Analytics integration
Schema markup
Sitemap and robots.txt

Website pages:
Home
About
Services
Why Counselling
Blog
Blog article page
Book Appointment
Contact
Privacy Policy
Terms
Disclaimer

The design should be professional, clean, and calm.
Use reusable components and modular architecture.
